category_sources: source_facts.description: Reads arbitrary PDF files and generates an XML file readable by Ipe.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository for ipe-tools; README is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/otfried/ipe-tools; repository lookup skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes PDF to Ipe XML conversion; source_facts.executables lists pdftoipe.
